# Gitio

The one git subprocess seam (rev-parse, status, first-parent log, show).

**Tier:** Core

## Modules

| Module | Size | Classes | Functions |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| `guardrail_hub.gitio` | XS | 0 | 7 |

## Public API

### `guardrail_hub.gitio`
- def `is_git_repo`
- def `head_sha`
- def `current_branch` ‚Äî Current branch name, or the literal ``HEAD`` when detached.
- def `branch_tip` ‚Äî Sha of a local branch tip, or None when the branch does not exist.
- def `is_dirty`
- def `first_parent_log` ‚Äî ``(short sha, YYYY-MM-DD)`` per first-parent commit of ``ref`` touching ``path``.
- def `show_file` ‚Äî File content at a commit. Raises RepoAccessError when absent at that commit.

- Depends on: [Errors](Errors.md)
- Used by: [History](History.md), [RepoScan](RepoScan.md), [Store](Store.md)
